prompt: Show the average overall course evaluation rating for each professor

inputData.question: Show the average overall course evaluation rating for each professor

response.bodyRaw:
{"status":"success","steps":{"input":{"question":"Show the average overall course evaluation rating for each professor"},"sql":{"payload":{"question":"Show the average overall course evaluation rating for each professor"},"startedAt":1771803355841,"status":"success","output":{"reasoning":"Join course_evaluations -> enrollments -> course_sections -> professors and compute AVG(overall_rating) per professor. I use LEFT JOINs so professors without evaluations appear with NULL average and order deterministically by average desc, then last/first name.","sql":"SELECT
  p.id AS professor_id,
  p.first_name AS professor_first_name,
  p.last_name AS professor_last_name,
  ROUND(AVG(ce.overall_rating)::numeric, 2) AS avg_overall_rating
FROM public.professors p
LEFT JOIN public.course_sections cs ON cs.professor_id = p.id
LEFT JOIN public.enrollments e ON e.course_section_id = cs.id
LEFT JOIN public.course_evaluations ce ON ce.enrollment_id = e.id
GROUP BY p.id, p.first_name, p.last_name
ORDER BY avg_overall_rating DESC NULLS LAST, p.last_name, p.first_name;","assumptions":["course_evaluations.enrollment_id -> enrollments.id, enrollments.course_section_id -> course_sections.id, course_sections.professor_id -> professors.id (confirmed via schema inspection)","overall_rating is numeric/integer and not null for stored evaluations (schema shows NOT NULL)","Include all professors; those without evaluations will have avg_overall_rating = NULL"]},"endedAt":1771803389409},"run-raw-sql":{"payload":{"sql":"SELECT
  p.id AS professor_id,
  p.first_name AS professor_first_name,
  p.last_name AS professor_last_name,
  ROUND(AVG(ce.overall_rating)::numeric, 2) AS avg_overall_rating
FROM public.professors p
LEFT JOIN public.course_sections cs ON cs.professor_id = p.id
LEFT JOIN public.enrollments e ON e.course_section_id = cs.id
LEFT JOIN public.course_evaluations ce ON ce.enrollment_id = e.id
GROUP BY p.id, p.first_name, p.last_name
ORDER BY avg_overall_rating DESC NULLS LAST, p.last_name, p.first_name;"},"startedAt":1771803389418,"status":"success","output":{"ok":true,"sql":"SELECT
  p.id AS professor_id,
  p.first_name AS professor_first_name,
  p.last_name AS professor_last_name,
  ROUND(AVG(ce.overall_rating)::numeric, 2) AS avg_overall_rating
FROM public.professors p
LEFT JOIN public.course_sections cs ON cs.professor_id = p.id
LEFT JOIN public.enrollments e ON e.course_section_id = cs.id
LEFT JOIN public.course_evaluations ce ON ce.enrollment_id = e.id
GROUP BY p.id, p.first_name, p.last_name
ORDER BY avg_overall_rating DESC NULLS LAST, p.last_name, visualization.title: Average Overall Course Evaluation by Professor

resultRaw.sql:
SELECT
  p.id AS professor_id,
  p.first_name AS professor_first_name,
  p.last_name AS professor_last_name,
  ROUND(AVG(ce.overall_rating)::numeric, 2) AS avg_overall_rating
FROM public.professors p
LEFT JOIN public.course_sections cs ON cs.professor_id = p.id
LEFT JOIN public.enrollments e ON e.course_section_id = cs.id
LEFT JOIN public.course_evaluations ce ON ce.enrollment_id = e.id
GROUP BY p.id, p.first_name, p.last_name
ORDER BY avg_overall_rating DESC NULLS LAST, p.last_name, p.first_name;

visualization.title: Average Overall Course Evaluation by Professor

result.sql:
SELECT
  p.id AS professor_id,
  p.first_name AS professor_first_name,
  p.last_name AS professor_last_name,
  ROUND(AVG(ce.overall_rating)::numeric, 2) AS avg_overall_rating
FROM public.professors p
LEFT JOIN public.course_sections cs ON cs.professor_id = p.id
LEFT JOIN public.enrollments e ON e.course_section_id = cs.id
LEFT JOIN public.course_evaluations ce ON ce.enrollment_id = e.id
GROUP BY p.id, p.first_name, p.last_name
ORDER BY avg_overall_rating DESC NULLS LAST, p.last_name, p.first_name;
